name: Arif Chowdhury
bio: We became inseparable during freshman year, pulling all-nighters to survive assignments and sharing every campus adventure together.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: We have been best friends since class seven. Distance hasn't changed a thing — our long calls feel like we never left school.

name: Tanvir Ahmed
bio: We met at a startup weekend and immediately started riffing on ideas. He's the best thinking partner I've ever had.

name: Sumaiya Parvin
bio: We formed our study group in second year and somehow always ended up going off topic into the best conversations.

name: Rakibul Hassan
bio: The guy who refused to let me skip leg day. His dedication is contagious and somehow I actually enjoy workouts now.

name: Roksana Begum
bio: She's known my family for years and caught the travel bug just as badly as I have. We have a running bucket list.

name: Ashiqur Rahman
bio: Grew up on the same street. We spent every evening chasing a football until the streetlights came on and our parents called us in.

name: Dilruba Akter
bio: We connected through a design community and never stopped. She sharpens my eye for detail every time we talk.

name: Mahmudul Hasan
bio: Matched in ranked, stayed for the banter. Our weekend sessions are the most reliable plans on my calendar.

name: Zarin Tasnim
bio: We built our capstone project together from a blank repo. She still sends me interesting papers and I always read every one.
